info.description: The Reset Room monthly subscription. Price is set here in pence — Stripe is just the gateway, this is the source of truth.

title.description: Display name shown on Stripe Checkout.

description.description: Marketing description (used on the page, not on Stripe Checkout).

pricePence.description: Price in pence. £25 = 2500. £19.50 = 1950. Must be a whole number of pence.

currency.description: Three-letter ISO currency code, lowercase. Default 'gbp'.

isRecurring.description: Tick for subscription, leave unchecked for one-off.

recurringInterval.description: Only used when 'isRecurring' is on. month = monthly billing, year = annual.

mailchimpTag.description: Tag attached on successful payment. Must match a Mailchimp tag name EXACTLY (case-sensitive).

grantsResetRoomAccess.description: If ticked, a successful payment promotes the user to the 'reset-room-member' role in Strapi (unlocks /community/reset-room/* gated pages).

features.description: List of membership features for the marketing page.

seo_title.description: Optional SEO title override (60 chars max). Leave blank to use the page/item name. Shown in Google search results and browser tabs.

seo_description.description: Short summary for Google and ChatGPT (1-2 sentences, ~155 chars). Write what someone searching for this would actually type. Fills in automatically when you Save — leave blank unless you want to override
